query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "agenticsts: a bounded-memory testbed for long-horizon llm agents" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) by investigating the same core mechanism (long-term memory in LLM agents) and the same domain (LLM agent testbeds) as the user's question, specifically addressing the security and integrity of the memory component which is central to the "Bounded-Memory Testbed" mentioned in the user's title. Although the user's question focuses on a specific testbed framework ("AgenticSTS") and the candidate paper focuses on a security defense ("TMA-NM"), both are canon
